creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Passing -I${LOCALBASE}/include to CFLAGS breaks the habbit of using CONFIGUREDCFLAGS (see cvs history why CONFIGUREDCFLAGS was introduced). The nice way to fix this would be to fix the Makefile to use CONFIGUREDCFLAGS at the point where it's ignored. Unless you want to give it a try I can look into it by the end of next week.
